diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -41,23 +41,26 @@
     mean = float(ckpt['mean'])

     std = float(ckpt['std'])

 

+    # Get model config from checkpoint if available

+    cfg = ckpt.get('model_config', {})

+    num_nodes = adj.shape[0]

+

     supports = get_supports(adj, device)

-    num_nodes = adj.shape[0]

 

     model = GraphWaveNet(

         num_nodes=num_nodes,

-        in_dim=1,

-        out_dim=12,

-        residual_channels=32,

-        dilation_channels=32,

-        skip_channels=256,

-        end_channels=512,

-        kernel_size=2,

-        blocks=4,

-        layers=2,

-        dropout=0.3,

+        in_dim=cfg.get('in_dim', 1),

+        out_dim=cfg.get('out_dim', 12),

+        residual_channels=cfg.get('residual_channels', 64),

+        dilation_channels=cfg.get('dilation_channels', 64),

+        skip_channels=cfg.get('skip_channels', 256),

+        end_channels=cfg.get('end_channels', 512),

+        kernel_size=cfg.get('kernel_size', 2),

+        blocks=cfg.get('blocks', 4),

+        layers=cfg.get('layers', 2),

+        dropout=0.0,  # no dropout at inference

         supports=supports,

-        adaptive_adj=True

+        adaptive_adj=cfg.get('adaptive_adj', True)

     ).to(device)

     model.load_state_dict(ckpt['model_state_dict'])

     model.eval()
